modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty submitting Facilities Management work order requests.

full_description_text: User was trying to submit a work order for Facilities Management. They were on the phone with help desk. The user speaks another language, so it was hard to understand. They need help with the process to submit the request correctly.
short_description: Difficulty submitting Facilities Management work order requests.
description: User was trying to submit a work order for Facilities Management. They were on the phone with help desk. The user speaks another language, so it was hard to understand. They need help with the process to submit the request correctly.
